hero.title: Credentials, milestones, and structured growth supporting the CaribAI ecosystem.
hero.description: This page shows the structured learning path developing alongside the systems, launches, and technical directions shaping CaribAI over time.

status.title: Structured growth alongside execution and technical development
status.description: CaribAI is being built through a mix of hands-on implementation, structured learning, and credentials that strengthen long-term technical credibility.

items.title: Completed
items.description: Earned certifications, badges, and formal milestones will be added here as they are completed.

items.title: In Progress
items.description: Python foundations, cloud and AI fundamentals, backend depth, and the milestones strengthening the technical side of the ecosystem.

items.title: Future Targets
items.description: Infrastructure growth, advanced AI and ML milestones, cybersecurity depth, and future higher-complexity AI directions as they are earned over time.

items.title: Why This Page Matters
items.description: It shows that the growth behind CaribAI is intentional, structured, and backed by more than motivation alone.

items.title: What It Signals
items.description: Discipline, follow-through, and a willingness to build both practical skills and formal credibility over time.

items.title: How It Fits the Brand
items.description: CaribAI is about visible progress, and credentials are part of that larger story when paired with real systems and projects.
